metadata.instruction: Open Chrome and close the application from Task Manager
metadata.context: I'm browsing on Chrome but it is frozen.

l3.rationale: Start of the Ctrl+Shift+Esc shortcut used to open Task Manager.

l4.rationale: Ctrl+Shift+Esc from Chrome opens Task Manager, moving to the Task Manager application.

l5.rationale: These navigation actions open and switch into the Task Manager window from Chrome.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus to the Task Manager search box.

l4.rationale: In Task Manager, the user focuses the search box, invokes search, types 'chrome', and then cancels the search interaction.

l5.rationale: The focus moves to the search box, text is entered, and the search filters for Chrome.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus to the Run new task button.

l4.rationale: After canceling search, the user tabs through Task Manager controls and column headers to move around the interface.

l5.rationale: The trace navigates to the Chrome process row and deletes it to terminate the frozen app.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus onward to the CPU column header.

l4.rationale: After canceling search, the user tabs through Task Manager controls and column headers to move around the interface.

l5.rationale: The trace navigates to the Chrome process row and deletes it to terminate the frozen app.

focused_element.name: CPU 22% Sorted (descending). Press Enter to change sorting.

focused_element.name: CPU 12% Sorted (descending). Press Enter to change sorting.

l3.rationale: Esc cancels focus or interaction on the column header.

l4.rationale: After canceling search, the user tabs through Task Manager controls and column headers to move around the interface.

l5.rationale: The trace navigates to the Chrome process row and deletes it to terminate the frozen app.

l3.rationale: Typing a letter jumps to and activates the Google Chrome process row.

l4.rationale: Typing 'g' selects the Google Chrome process row, and Delete confirms ending that application.

l5.rationale: The trace navigates to the Chrome process row and deletes it to terminate the frozen app.

l3.rationale: Delete ends the selected Google Chrome process row.

l4.rationale: Typing 'g' selects the Google Chrome process row, and Delete confirms ending that application.

l5.rationale: The trace navigates to the Chrome process row and deletes it to terminate the frozen app.

l3.rationale: Tab moves focus to the Processes navigation item.

l4.rationale: The user continues tabbing and canceling selections to move among Task Manager navigation items after the kill action.

l5.rationale: Focus returns to the search box and the remaining text is selected and deleted to reset Task Manager.

l3.rationale: Start of the Ctrl+F find shortcut in the search box.

l4.rationale: Ctrl+F returns to the search box, then Ctrl+A and Delete clear the existing search text.
